zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Helias De Aubeney於大約1262年出生在法國布列塔尼時，他的父親Ralph D'aubingy50歲，母親Iseult Sulney42歲。他於1297年與Joan de Guernsey在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1305年4月8日在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內易斯萊-素-素普享年44歲，埋葬在澤西島。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Helias De Aubeney于大约1262年出生在法国布列塔尼时，他的父亲Ralph D'aubingy50岁，母亲Iseult Sulney42岁。他于1297年与Joan de Guernsey在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1305年4月8日在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內易斯萊-素-素普享年44岁，埋葬在泽西岛。

nameMeanings.name: Aubeney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Daubney
meanings: English (mainly Lincolnshire; of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from any of several places in northern France called Aubigny, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Albinius (a derivative of Latin albus ‘white’; compare Albin ) + the habitational suffix -acum. Compare Dabney .

nameMeanings.name: Helias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Greek form (used in the New Testament) of the name of the prophet   Elijah .  It is one of a number of Old Testament names which have come back into favour since the latter part of the 20th century.  See also  Ellis .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Helias De Aubeney was born about 1262, in Brittany, France, his father, Ralph D'aubingy, was 50 and his mother, Iseult Sulney, was 42. He married Joan de Guernsey in 1297, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 April 1305, in Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Jersey.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Helias De Aubeney est né environ 1262, à Bretagne, France, son père, Ralph D'aubingy, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Iseult Sulney, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Guernsey en 1297, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1305, à Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Jersey.

de.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Helias De Aubeney um 1262 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph D'aubingy 50 und seine Mutter Iseult Sulney 42. Er hat 1297 in Lincolnshire, England Joan de Guernsey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1305 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Jersey begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Helias De Aubeney è nato il circa 1262 nel Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Ralph D'aubingy, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Iseult Sulney, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Guernsey nel 1297, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1305, nel Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Jersey.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Helias De Aubeneyが約1262年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Ralph D'aubingyは50歳，母Iseult Sulneyは42歳であった。1297年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでJoan de Guernseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1305年4月8日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンイスレス-スル-スイップで44歳で死去し，ジャージーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Helias De Aubeney(이)가 대략 1262년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph D'aubingy(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Iseult Sulney(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1297년 영국 링코실르에서 Joan de Guernsey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 4월 8일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 이슬레스-수-수이프에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 저지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Helias De Aubeney nasceu aproximadamente 1262, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Ralph D'aubingy, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Iseult Sulney, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Guernsey em 1297, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1305, em Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Jérsei.

ro.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Helias De Aubeney родился около 1262 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Ralph D'aubingy было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Iseult Sulney, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Guernsey в 1297 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1305 г. в местности ислес-сур-суипп, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности Джерси.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Helias De Aubeney nació aproximadamente 1262, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Ralph D'aubingy, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Iseult Sulney, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Joan de Guernsey en 1297, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1305, en Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Jersey.
